heading: Exemptions and equivalents
label: 4305 Exemptions and equivalents
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)430546:1458Section 4305 permits the Secretary to grant appropriate exemptions from the requirements of this chapter when recreational vessel safety will not be adversely affected.

Amendments2021— substituted “Exemptions and equivalents” for “Exemptions” in section catchline, designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and inserted heading, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 116–283
amendments: Amendments2021— substituted “Exemptions and equivalents” for “Exemptions” in section catchline, designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and inserted heading, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 116–283

children.heading: .—Exemptions
children.label: a .—Exemptions
children.text: If the Secretary considers that recreational vessel safety will not be adversely affected, the Secretary may issue an exemption from this chapter or a regulation prescribed under this chapter.

children.heading: .—Equivalents
children.label: b .—Equivalents
children.text: The Secretary may accept a substitution for associated equipment performance or other safety standards for a recreational vessel if the substitution provides an equivalent level of safety.
